# Strava Dashboard — CLAUDE.md

## What this project is
A personal Strava activity dashboard deployed as a static site on Vercel. No backend server — all Strava API calls happen in the browser. Supabase is used to cache activity data so the 200-activity limit doesn't require re-fetching every visit.

## Build & deploy
```bash
node build.js        # injects env vars from .env.local into dist/
vercel --prod        # deploy to https://stravadashboard.vercel.app
```

**Never edit files in `dist/` directly** — they are regenerated by `build.js` on every deploy.

Required `.env.local` vars:
```
STRAVA_CLIENT_ID=
STRAVA_CLIENT_SECRET=
SUPABASE_URL=
SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=
```

## Project structure

```
index.html          — single-page app, all sections rendered here
callback.html       — OAuth redirect target
build.js            — injects .env.local secrets into dist/
js/
  config.js         — injected at build time (client ID, Supabase keys)
  utils.js          — shared helpers: decodePolyline, kmh, fmtD, fmtT, fmtDt, isRide, setStatus
  auth.js           — Strava OAuth + token refresh
  app.js            — bootstrap, nav events, loadData(), hamburger menu
  render-overview.js — Overview section: stat cards, heatmap (Leaflet)
  render-charts.js  — Charts section: Chart.js wrappers
  render-sections.js — All other sections: Trophies, Segments, Monthly, Gear, Photos, etc.
  story-core.js     — Story card: state vars, STAT_DEFS, SCHEMES, LAYOUTS, getScheme
  story-draw.js     — Story card: drawRoute, drawIcon canvas helpers
  story-layouts.js  — Story card: drawLayout() with all 19 layout switch cases
  story-ui.js       — Story card: drawStoryCanvas(), openStoryModal() UI wiring
css/
  base.css          — CSS variables, reset, typography
  nav.css           — Top nav bar + hamburger
  buttons.css       — Button variants
  sidebar.css       — Sidebar navigation
  layout.css        — App layout, main content area
  cards.css         — Generic card components
  components.css    — Misc UI components (modal, stat cards, charts, heatmap, calendar)
  story.css         — Story card modal styles
  sections.css      — Section-specific styles (segments, trophies, gear, photos, etc.)
  responsive.css    — Media query breakpoints
  styles.css        — LEGACY — not loaded, kept for reference only
```

## Key globals (set in utils.js / app.js)
- `acts` — array of up to 200 Strava activities (loaded via Supabase cache or API)
- `charts` — Chart.js instance map, destroyed before re-render
- `currentSection` — active nav section id

## Story card (story-*.js)
The story card generates 9:16 PNG images (1080×1920) using Canvas 2D API.

**State vars** (in `story-core.js`):
- `activeLayout` — currently selected layout id
- `activeScheme` — color theme key (transp/white/dark/orange/night/forest/...)
- `customAccent` — hex override for accent color, null = use scheme default
- `checkedStats` — Set of stat keys to display
- `hideTitle`, `hideDate`, `hideRoute`, `hideLogo` — toggle flags
- `storyBgImage` — uploaded Image object for background, null = use layout default

**Adding a new layout:**
1. Add `{id:'myid', name:'My Layout'}` to `LAYOUTS` array in `story-core.js`
2. Add `case 'myid': { ... break; }` to the switch in `story-layouts.js`
3. Use `skipBg` flag to skip drawing background when a photo is uploaded
4. Use `hideTitle`, `hideDate`, `hideRoute`, `hideLogo` flags throughout
5. Use `selected` (array of checked STAT_DEFS) for dynamic stats — never hardcode stat values

**Scale factor:** `const S = W/1080` — multiply all pixel values by `S` so layouts work at both 1080px (main canvas) and 216px (thumbnails).

## Segments
Leaflet maps are initialised in hidden sections. Always call:
```js
setTimeout(() => { try { map.invalidateSize(); } catch {} }, 300);
```
after `map.fitBounds()` to fix rendering in hidden containers.

## Heatmap
Default zoom is Bali (`[−8.4, 115.2]`, zoom 12), falls back to activity centroid if rides exist.

## Trophies section
Uses Strava `/athletes/{id}/stats` for all-time, YTD, and last-4-week data. **Not** `/trophy-case` (web-only, no API).

## Auth
Tokens stored in `localStorage`. Expired tokens are refreshed automatically via `auth.js`. Revoked tokens redirect to login screen.

## Conventions
- All distances in metres internally, converted with `fmtD()` for display
- All speeds in m/s internally, converted with `kmh()` for display
- `isRide(act)` detects cycling activity types (Ride, VirtualRide, EBikeRide, GravelRide, MountainBikeRide)
- Do not use `addEventListener` inside `openStoryModal` for static checkboxes — use `.onchange =` to prevent listener stacking on re-open
- CSS variables are defined in `base.css` (`--orange`, `--surface`, `--border`, etc.)
